truth-serum 0.6.1
  Multi-language verification of AI-generated code (Python, JavaScript, TypeScript).
  Source: truth-serum@truth-serum-marketplace

Component inventory
  Skills (1)  lie-detector
  Agents (1)  auditor
  Hooks (3)  UserPromptSubmit, PostToolUse, Stop  (harness-only — no model context cost)
  MCP servers (0)
  LSP servers (0)

Projected token cost
  Always-on:   ~243 tok   added to every session

Per-component (rounded)
  component     always-on  on-invoke
  lie-detector       ~240      ~1.6k
  auditor              ~3      ~2.4k

  On-invoke cost is paid each time a skill or agent fires.
  Token counts are estimates and may differ from actual usage.
